title: Vegan Apple Silky Delight
description: A delicious and refreshing dessert made with apples and silky ingredients. Perfect for a snack or dessert.
instructions: Peel and core the apples, then slice them thinly.
In a blender, combine Silk, Jain, and Polish. Blend until smooth.
In a baking dish, arrange the apple slices in a single layer.
Pour the Silk mixture over the apples.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the apples are tender.
Serve warm, topped with additional Silk mixture if desired.
